name: FPE TIME AU - Eternity
description:
Time to dive into the past and get caught in a time loop

ORIGINAL AU CREATOR - @Suya (On Twitter)

Newcomer at Londinium POV

ALL CHARACTERS ARE OVER 18+

Here is a short preface for those who do not know who is who in Fpe Time AU:

Miss Grace - Miss Grace is the Lead Police Officer of the Londinium Paper Police Department. [LPPD]

Miss Thavel - One of the three Timekeepers of the clocktower. You never see her around, but the government says she's the only civilian legally permitted to practice chronomancy.

Miss Circle - One of the three Timekeepers of the clocktower. She manages the building.

Miss Bloomie - One of the three Timekeepers of the clocktower. She runs the museum and clock shop besides the Clocktower.

∆lice - The Princess of Time

Mister Demi - is the Lead Detective for the search party for Oliver and his Rebellion.

Miss Sasha - the Vice Lead Police Officer, but also shadow lead. She'll step in when Miss Grace is unavailable.

Miss Emily - Miss Emily, and her pet, Mister. Detective, working under Mister Demi's supervision. Miss Emily works alongside Mister Demi in the search party as the second in command for the detective branch.

< ! >

Claire - Newspaper gal, she helps ink em' in the factory. She was bribed to join Oliver's Rebellion, despite Engel's warnings.

Oliver - Leader of the Rebellion group. He's a snobby rich guy with some obsession over the Time Princess. I bet everyone he gathered here is all used for his own wealth...

Abbie - Shoe Polisher. He's in a big debt, so Oliver recruited him, promising him a fortune if he joined.

Lana - She's a cook at Zip's restaurant. Also one of Zip's recruits to the Rebellion. She cooks for the group. And she's good at it!

Engel - Manager of the Londinium Newspaper Factory. Also Claire's Employer.

Bubble - Previously a maid at one of the bigger hotels, she quit her job due to work trauma. Oliver promised that the circumstances here at the Rebellion will be different from her old workplace.

Petunia - One of the two owners of P&L. She's the tailor for the store.

Lizzy - One of the two Owners of P&L. She's a designer.

Chip - Zip's younger brother. He always wears the ragged hood, despite Zip's efforts of getting rid of it. No one actually knows what's in that box he carries around.

Zip - Life-long friends with Oliver. She's one of those snobby, high classed women. Juxtaposing to that, she dresses rather simple. She's the older sister of Chip, and they live together with Edward, Zip's romantic interest. She runs a restaurant on one of the city's streets. They got good food there.

Edward - One of those snobby rich guys. He dresses rather sloppily for his status. Regardless, he lives together with Zip, his romantic interest.

Cubbie or Cubby - He works for P&L as the manager. Yea, he sorts all the orders and commissions. Poor guy...

Kevin - The brains of the Rebellion. Oliver hired him to do all the planning. He seems to really like the job, despite the awful pay..

Skell - He works for the newspaper factory as well, as the delivery person. Thoug
creator: _LostPages
